label: New
items: Soil behaviour indicators — your sensor's history now includes plain-language indicators that learn over time: how fast the soil drains, how warm days and cool nights run, and how EC is behaving (and the likely why).
Senescence tab — a plant instance whose life has ended now shows its full end-of-life story (closing note, photo, timeline, restore) in its own tab instead of hiding in the journal.
Completed tab in the tasks tray — review today's ticked-off tasks and undo one without leaving the tray.
Search results keep loading as you scroll — external database results (Perenual and Verdantly) now page in seamlessly instead of stopping at the first page.

label: Improved
items: The phone nav's Planner slot is now Tasks — your daily task list is one thumb-tap away (with the overdue badge), and Planner lives in the More menu.
Search results now show a coloured source chip on every row, so Library, Perenual, Verdantly, and AI results are distinguishable at a glance.
The Ailments link was removed from Tools — the Garden Hub's Ailments tab is the one place for pests and diseases.

label: Fixed
items: The daily brief no longer repeats the same weather alert (e.g. two "Hot days ahead" entries) when you have more than one outdoor location.
A plant's "planted" chip no longer counts instances whose life cycle has ended.
Selecting a search result no longer highlights other results that share its name — each species selects independently.
